items.summary: Update the hardcoded admin credentials in the backend adminLogin function to use email 'hiteshmodi2007@gmail.com' and password 'Hitesh1234@'.

In the Header component, display the user's uploaded logo image (user-logo.dim_200x60.png from frontend/public/assets/generated/) to the LEFT of the existing Trusted Cars wordmark/logo. Both logos must appear side by side. Do not remove or replace the existing Trusted Cars logo — only add the user's logo on its left. Apply the same change in the Footer component.
